sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70665" key="nhmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νημᾰτ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n70665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woven,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅπλον,</foreign> of a band of plaited rope or web- <pb n="1174" TEIform="pb"/> bing, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:34:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
